violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Observed handles on the cooler that was damaged at time of inspection. Observed build up on the ice machine needs to be clean.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observed loose debris on the bottom on the shelves in the reach in freezer on the food line.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observed handles were dirty on the reach in freezer at time of inspection.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Observed hood system on the main line needs to be clean more frequently.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed open packages of food in walk in freezer.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed heavy syrup buildup between nozzles of juice dispenser.--Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed dried food in microwave in food prep area. -Observed dried food on cutting boards of cold hold units.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Observed inside of upright freezer in food prep area needs floor and walls to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floors need to be cleaned especially by fryer and griddle.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. -Observed light shield in food prep area was not latched.
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
